tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Substitute this for Bm if the barre is too hard

Bm: X2023X

Capo 2

[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
They say oh my god I see the way you shine[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Take your hand, my dear, and place them both in mine[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
You know you stopped me dead when I was passing by[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
And now I beg to see you dance just one more time[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Oh I see you, see you, see you every time[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
And oh my I, I, I, I like your style[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
You, you make me, make me, make me wanna try[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                                 N.C.
And now I beg to see you dance just one more time[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]N.C.     [ch]Em[/ch]
So I say Dance for me Dance for me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Dance for me, oh oh oh[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                                   [ch]Bm[/ch]
I've never seen anybody do the things you do before[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
They say move for me move for me[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Move for me, ay ay ay[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
And when you're done I'll make you do it all again[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
I said oh my god I see you walking by[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
Take my hands, my dear, and look me in my eyes[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]
Just like a monkey I've been dancing my whole life[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
And you just beg to see me dance just one more time[/tab]

[Pre-chorus]
